textByHash.02b6eddd867c0e1fcef79516d552c6986df8ecc5: Yes, my sister told me not to go, she said it was dangerous and that I'm no fighter. Unfortunately... she was correct.
textByHash.0f0aec71ed85943e53aadd882f3c6df1138818c3: There you go, now that I've imbued all of your sceptres, once they run out of charges they will no longer break and they can be charged with any piece of the sceptre you find.
textByHash.4a9adc9161c0264dc66bec5f5c0948c02c7707dc: I died... Of course, I tried escaping, long before I'd made it to the treasure, but I was shot with arrows just as I approached the exit.
textByHash.51b4494090eb170b530cc65e16ced7f9daef5244: To make sure your account is secured, please turn on the authenticator. Simply visit the support link on the oldschool.runescape.com website.
textByHash.52431ea55487443886f1cdb6ce714214c33819b9: It seems your account isn't as secure as it could be, I'm afraid I can't imbue your sceptre.
textByHash.5690546b9a5672f8b554f95bd7865535f76c5e72: Oh marvellous! If only I had corporeal form I'd be able to wear them, but alas...
textByHash.5db888029f3cf322b3c81172677e6335fb117386: As I said, I am Solztun, the greatest barbarian explorer! I came to explore this place, but unfortunately I died long before I made it to the treasure.
textByHash.793ef3c6e324053c515b463459064df2651db8a4: Most of them give 3, although the left skull gives 5. Each completed tier of the Varrock achievement diary will get you one extra charge per piece and allow your sceptre to hold 4 more charges.
textByHash.86f5420a4ab0b76d8c397386e6b4e5f33b5bcd63: Hmm... I don't have much to offer, but if you happen upon a skull sceptre, I could make it stronger.
textByHash.a70c30a687026051f7aaedb3a8a3734f9fc81c3b: It seems you have the authenticator set up, that's perfect! Now just show me the treasure.
textByHash.ac433786a9be713b09b10ec042a29d1e6ff8d3d4: Oh no, they had no idea I was hurt, I guess they assumed I'd found the treasure and made a new life for myself.
textByHash.b31cc458160e51b59a31601de5992e97a7b098c1: Try not to think about it.
textByHash.bb6ffb9363ac234f774b1f48cdbb9597649d6f7e: Finally, be warned that if you disable your authenticator, the imbue on the sceptre will be removed.
textByHash.c7cb97fc8730f21fad00695731eb8b5e1809b0b4: You can use a chisel to break a sceptre piece into fragments, then use those to charge the sceptre instead. More flexible if you ask me.
textByHash.ca849239c915256418cff9f197ceacea9bf6eaa6: Currently the sceptre is fragile, it breaks once all charges have been used. Show me the treasure and I could imbue it so it can be recharged with any sceptre piece.
textByHash.d866df1cfd288e1fd92eb61d57b293ddc5e4b17d: It was all death and pillaging, I prefer the finer things in life, like exploration and discovery!
textByHash.d97dc61bf00f1a67f1c41b9551ce572df65577da: I sense that you don't have the treasure.
textByHash.dc7f81cedc24a578c6ad25fb8dcffc72c1b13ac1: Of course I can... But first, you must show me whatever treasure lies within that cradle and make sure that your account is safe.
textByHash.e7cb3da5ed1a3cdc07363f0270fcaa56ed2a441a: I'm no ghost! I'm a spirit, I'm injecting my thoughts into your head.
textByHash.ee7b87162b320ae22cf8a81b207c9794536fd0f7: I am Solztun, the greatest barbarian explorer!
textByHash.ffbcc438c80a621fe0586463b465397eae5ba6eb: Of course, of course! In fact if you have more than one I'll imbue all of them!
